summary: Iteration 20 - All new features tested and working. About page (/about) loads correctly with hero, bio, philosophy, work & impact, and mission & vision sections. Program detail pages (/program/:id) render with Cinzel font titles in small-caps, gold category labels, dynamic content sections, CTA 'When you are seeking', and testimonials. Homepage 'Read Full Bio' button links to /about. Header ABOUT menu navigates to /about. Footer has ABOUT link, program links to /program/:id, Terms & Privacy links. Terms and Privacy pages load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AboutPage.jsx: Correctly implements hero with Cinzel font, Meet the Healer section, Our Philosophy and Work & Impact cards, Mission & Vision dark section
ProgramDetailPage.jsx: Hero uses Cinzel with small-caps for title, gold category label, renders content_sections dynamically with fallback defaults (The Journey, Who it is for, Your Experience)
Header.jsx: ABOUT link in menu navigates to /about
Footer.jsx: ABOUT link present, 6 program links navigate to /program/:id, Terms & Privacy links with data-testid attributes
AboutSection.jsx: Read Full Bio button correctly links to /about
index.html: Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, and Lato fonts properly loaded via Google Fonts CDN
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from iteration 19
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 20 features working: 1) /about page with all 5 sections (hero, bio, philosophy, impact, mission/vision), 2) /program/:id pages with Cinzel titles, gold labels, dynamic sections, CTA, testimonials, 3) Read Full Bio → /about, 4) Header ABOUT → /about, 5) Footer ABOUT → /about, 6) Footer program links → /program/:id, 7) /terms and /privacy pages. Phone OTP is MOCKED.
